highlights: Korea's pavilion for the 61st Venice Biennale (May 9-Nov 22) theme announced as 'Liberation Space: Fortress and Nest'.
Amorepacific Museum of Art schedules Jonas Wood (Sept) and special collection exhibitions.
Art Korea Lab recruiting artists for Australia's 'Now or Never' festival until March 23.

stocks.market_sentiment: Volatile; influenced by new BOK leadership and semiconductor dependence.
key_events: Shin Hyun-song appointed Bank of Korea head, promising 'balanced' policy.
Goldman Sachs sets year-end 2026 Kospi target at 7,000 despite current volatility.
FSC proposing two-tier Kosdaq restructuring; mixed market reaction.
